description: The company's sales strategy is shifting to target the green energy sector, and marketing is relying on online seminars. Update the system's dropdown lists and create the first account in this new sector. Add a new item to the 'industry_dom' dropdown with the key 'Renewable_Energy' and display label 'Renewable Energy'. Add a new item to the 'lead_source_dom' dropdown with the key 'Webinar' and display label 'Webinar'. Finally, create a new account named 'SolarTech Solutions' with the industry set to 'Renewable Energy'.
